title: March 4
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 4''' is the 63rd day of the year (64th in leap years). There are 302 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1931|1931]] – [[Larry Keith]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Randy Stradley]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Daniel Roebuck]] is born.
*[[1991]] – [[Pip Andersen]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 28|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 28]] published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Tatooine Ghost]]'' hardcover published.
*2003 – [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Wookieepedia]] is founded under the name "Star Wars Wiki."
*2005 – "[[When the Domino Falls]]" reprinted on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.5|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.5]] published.
*[[2011]] – "[[Counterattack]]" aired on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Honor Among Thieves]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Princess Leia 1|''Princess Leia'' 1]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Tony Dyson]] dies.
*[[2017]] – "[[Secret Cargo]]" premiered on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2022]] – "[[Pilots of the Rebel Alliance]]" published.
*[[2025]] – ''[[Hyperspace Stories: Qui-Gon]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Mandalorian Warriors]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Master Yoda]]'' published.
*[[2026]] – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents 2|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents'' 2]] published.
*2026 – [[Shadow of Maul 1|''Shadow of Maul'' 1]] published.
